records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something... suddenly came out... from the ground?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's sucking the corpses using the roots buried underground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, haha...!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this a dream...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this a dream...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. It'll be troublesome for me if you call in backup.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. It'll be troublesome for me if you call in backup.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. It'll be troublesome for me if you call in backup.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since you saw what happens behind the stage, I can't spare you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since you saw what happens behind the stage, I can't spare you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since you saw what happens behind the stage, I can't spare you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although the Grand Dimension Crevice is farther away than I expected, I can't afford to delay any longer.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Although the Grand Dimension Crevice is farther away than I expected, I can't afford to delay any longer.

records.m_Talk_DEU: If I connect the last three locations...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I connect the last three locations...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know. I have seen you before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know. I have seen you before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know. I have seen you before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Fascinating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Fascinating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Fascinating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stealing the voice of a dead soldier to speak.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stealing the voice of a dead soldier to speak.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stealing the voice of a dead soldier to speak.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You. I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You. I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seen you before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seen you before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seen you before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Over <color=#ffd34c>there</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Over <color=#ffd34c>there</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Over <color=#ffd34c>there</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grr...! Grrrrr...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grr...! Grrrrr...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grr...! Grrrrr...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Category 3 C.O. at best...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Category 3 C.O. at best...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Category 3 C.O. at best...

records.m_Talk_ENG: However...
records.m_Talk_DEU: However...
records.m_Talk_FRA: However...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Grr! Krrrgh!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Grr! Krrrgh!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Grr! Krrrgh!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The timing is impeccable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The timing is impeccable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The timing is impeccable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that they are passing on information to their kind when dying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that they are passing on information to their kind when dying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that they are passing on information to their kind when dying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kill. To not die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kill. To not die.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kill. To not die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More power. Bigger possibilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: More power. Bigger possibilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: More power. Bigger possibilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Krwaaaar...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Krwaaaar...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Krwaaaar...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Corrupted Wedge...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Corrupted Wedge...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Corrupted Wedge...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Interesting. You can create a Counterside Effect intentionally?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Interesting. You can create a Counterside Effect intentionally?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Interesting. You can create a Counterside Effect intentionally?

records.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s. Listen. To me. Unlike you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s. Listen. To me. Unlike you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s. Listen. To me. Unlike you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I stimulate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I stimulate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I stimulate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instinct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instinct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instinct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...A gun shot?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...A gun shot?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...A gun shot?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yay! We won!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yay! We won!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yay! We won!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha! Nice. I'll be eatin' good for a couple of days now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha! Nice. I'll be eatin' good for a couple of days now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha! Nice. I'll be eatin' good for a couple of days now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What category is this Corrupted Wedge? It's a Category 3, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What category is this Corrupted Wedge? It's a Category 3, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What category is this Corrupted Wedge? It's a Category 3, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, this again? You just won't let it go, will you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, this again? You just won't let it go, will you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, this again? You just won't let it go, will you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave her be. She's a good kid, just a little stupid in the head.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave her be. She's a good kid, just a little stupid in the head.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave her be. She's a good kid, just a little stupid in the head.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though I'm not that experienced, let me give you some advice. Give up trying to get into that company.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though I'm not that experienced, let me give you some advice. Give up trying to get into that company.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though I'm not that experienced, let me give you some advice. Give up trying to get into that company.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if I miss my chance now, there's no telling when they're gonna hire again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if I miss my chance now, there's no telling when they're gonna hire again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if I miss my chance now, there's no telling when they're gonna hire again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I decided to seize this opportunity!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I decided to seize this opportunity!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I decided to seize this opportunity!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, I've never heard of a company having to defeat a Category 3 C.O. as a requirement for joining.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, I've never heard of a company having to defeat a Category 3 C.O. as a requirement for joining.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, I've never heard of a company having to defeat a Category 3 C.O. as a requirement for joining.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? We should report that to the Administration! That's crazy!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? We should report that to the Administration! That's crazy!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? We should report that to the Administration! That's crazy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You seem to be new to all of this, but you gotta be careful when choosing your first company.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You seem to be new to all of this, but you gotta be careful when choosing your first company.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You seem to be new to all of this, but you gotta be careful when choosing your first company.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I joined one that wasn't in good shape, and look at me now. I'm a freelancer doing odd jobs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I joined one that wasn't in good shape, and look at me now. I'm a freelancer doing odd jobs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I joined one that wasn't in good shape, and look at me now. I'm a freelancer doing odd jobs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Err... But I want to be a member of the Fenrir Squad, not a mercenary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Err... But I want to be a member of the Fenrir Squad, not a mercenary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Err... But I want to be a member of the Fenrir Squad, not a mercenary.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Yo, you two. How about just working with us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yo, you two. How about just working with us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, I'm not sure about her, but you're one tough fighter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, I'm not sure about her, but you're one tough fighter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, I'm not sure about her, but you're one tough fighter.

root.m_Talk_FRA: However...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Grr! Krrrgh!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Grr! Krrrgh!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Grr! Krrrgh!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The timing is impeccable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The timing is impeccable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The timing is impeccable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that they are passing on information to their kind when dying.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that they are passing on information to their kind when dying.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that they are passing on information to their kind when dying.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kill. To not die.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kill. To not die.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kill. To not die.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Want.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Want.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Want.

root.m_Talk_ENG: More power. Bigger possibilities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: More power. Bigger possibilities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: More power. Bigger possibilities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Krwaaaar...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Krwaaaar...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Krwaaaar...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Corrupted Wedge...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Corrupted Wedge...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Corrupted Wedge...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Interesting. You can create a Counterside Effect intentionally?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Interesting. You can create a Counterside Effect intentionally?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Interesting. You can create a Counterside Effect intentionally?

root.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s. Listen. To me. Unlike you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s. Listen. To me. Unlike you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s. Listen. To me. Unlike you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I stimulate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I stimulate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I stimulate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Instinct.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Instinct.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Instinct.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...A gun shot?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...A gun shot?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...A gun shot?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yay! We won!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yay! We won!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yay! We won!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha! Nice. I'll be eatin' good for a couple of days now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha! Nice. I'll be eatin' good for a couple of days now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha! Nice. I'll be eatin' good for a couple of days now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What category is this Corrupted Wedge? It's a Category 3, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What category is this Corrupted Wedge? It's a Category 3, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What category is this Corrupted Wedge? It's a Category 3, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, this again? You just won't let it go, will you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, this again? You just won't let it go, will you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, this again? You just won't let it go, will you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leave her be. She's a good kid, just a little stupid in the head.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leave her be. She's a good kid, just a little stupid in the head.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leave her be. She's a good kid, just a little stupid in the head.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though I'm not that experienced, let me give you some advice. Give up trying to get into that company.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though I'm not that experienced, let me give you some advice. Give up trying to get into that company.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though I'm not that experienced, let me give you some advice. Give up trying to get into that company.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if I miss my chance now, there's no telling when they're gonna hire again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if I miss my chance now, there's no telling when they're gonna hire again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if I miss my chance now, there's no telling when they're gonna hire again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I decided to seize this opportunity!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I decided to seize this opportunity!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I decided to seize this opportunity!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, I've never heard of a company having to defeat a Category 3 C.O. as a requirement for joining.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, I've never heard of a company having to defeat a Category 3 C.O. as a requirement for joining.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, I've never heard of a company having to defeat a Category 3 C.O. as a requirement for joining.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? We should report that to the Administration! That's crazy!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? We should report that to the Administration! That's crazy!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? We should report that to the Administration! That's crazy!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You seem to be new to all of this, but you gotta be careful when choosing your first company.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You seem to be new to all of this, but you gotta be careful when choosing your first company.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You seem to be new to all of this, but you gotta be careful when choosing your first company.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I joined one that wasn't in good shape, and look at me now. I'm a freelancer doing odd jobs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I joined one that wasn't in good shape, and look at me now. I'm a freelancer doing odd jobs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I joined one that wasn't in good shape, and look at me now. I'm a freelancer doing odd jobs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Err... But I want to be a member of the Fenrir Squad, not a mercenary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Err... But I want to be a member of the Fenrir Squad, not a mercenary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Err... But I want to be a member of the Fenrir Squad, not a mercenary.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yo, you two. How about just working with us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yo, you two. How about just working with us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yo, you two. How about just working with us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, I'm not sure about her, but you're one tough fighter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, I'm not sure about her, but you're one tough fighter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, I'm not sure about her, but you're one tough fighter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Keke. Legendary TASKFORCEs all claim to have met each other out on the field by chance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Keke. Legendary TASKFORCEs all claim to have met each other out on the field by chance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Keke. Legendary TASKFORCEs all claim to have met each other out on the field by chance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean by that? I'm a good fighter too!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean by that? I'm a good fighter too!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean by that? I'm a good fighter too!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Then what's your Counter grade?

root.m_Talk_DEU: C-counter grade...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-counter grade...?

root.m_Talk_DEU: W-well... Um...
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-well... Um...
